facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: Handlers registered in the dispatch switch (e.g. HandleSubmitTestAuditPacket, HandleCreateRunFromPlannerHandoff, HandleListOpenRuns, HandleGetRunStatus, HandleSubmitAuditPacket, HandleGetNextPassWork, HandleGetNextAuditWork) do not all correspond to tool schema vars discoverable by the scanner. The scanner may miss tools whose schemas are not exported Tool-prefixed vars.

facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: Profile-gate classification is defined in hard-coded agentrefs maps (profileGatedToolNames) rather than derived from the runtime profile check (contextBrokerEnabled) or contract definitions. Changes to profile gating in server.go may not be reflected in generated facts.

facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: Mutation classification (ProfileGate and Mutation fields) is defined in hard-coded agentrefs maps (mutationToolNames, profileGatedToolNames) rather than derived from handler AST analysis, runtime dispatch side-effect logs, or contract-backed review. Updates to tool behavior may drift without detection.

facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: No automated smoke-test coverage linkage exists between generated MCP tool facts and MCP integration tests (internal/mcp/*_test.go). Generated tool existence facts are not validated against runtime registration during agentrefs generation.

facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: Scanner infers handler-to-schema links via naming convention matching (HandleXxx ↔ ToolXxx) rather than AST-level dispatch-switch case resolution. Some tools may have incorrect or missing handler mapping in generated facts.

facts.label: unresolved
facts.statement: Some exported Tool-prefixed schema vars may not have a direct handler in the dispatch switch, or may be inherited/aliased. The scanner reports inferred handler names without verifying they appear in the switch statement.

facts.label: proven
facts.statement: Tools are dispatched via switch on params.Name in server.handleToolsCall with profile-gate checks for gated tools returning CodeMethodNotFound when the profile is not enabled.

facts.label: proven
facts.statement: Context broker and refactor backlog tools are profile-gated behind context_broker_profile_required. Plan-attempt, plan-seed, run-status, and audit-submission tools are always registered.
